name: locale
description: Locale for weekday / month labels. Defaults to `'en-US'`.

name: weekStart
description: First day of the week. Defaults to the locale's convention.

name: size
description: Visual size — matches the kit's `Size` scale.

name: bare
description: Drop the calendar's own background, padding, and border-radius — useful when embedded in a surface that already provides chrome (Dialog, Menu, Card).

name: variant
description: Visual variant. `'transparent'` drops the background only (padding and radius are kept) so the calendar inherits the surface it is placed on.

name: color
description: Calendar chrome accent. Use `dayColor` for per-day overrides.

name: dayColor
description: Per-day color override. Returning `undefined` keeps the calendar's `color`.

name: onchange
description: Fires when a day is picked. Payload is the ISO string for `single`, `DateRange` for `range`.
